activeProjects.name: AI-Enhanced Conformer Search (MTD)
activeProjects.description: Meta-dynamics-based conformer search implemented in MLatom, benchmarked against CREST, deployed on Aitomia.

activeProjects.name: Water Cluster MLIP Training Data
activeProjects.description: OpenMM-driven generation of water cluster configurations (n = 2–60) with PBC lattice data for downstream AIQM/DFT single-point calculations.

activeProjects.name: Ambimodal Pericyclic Reaction Dynamics
activeProjects.description: Reproducing literature ambimodal pericyclic reactions using MLatom's uAIQM-optimal model and quasi-classical trajectory analysis.

latestUpdates.text: Deployed two academic portfolio websites to GitHub Pages.
Built a complete QCT pipeline for ambimodal pericyclic reaction analysis with verified bond indices.
Developed a Python pipeline for water cluster training data generation using OpenMM.
